creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Reporter Could you provide additional information, including:

- uname -a output
- Git commit hash of the ports tree version
- pkg version -v output (as an attachment)
- full build log (as an attachment, compressed if necessary)
- /etc/make.conf contents (as an attachment, if not empty)

If there is a .core file produced, include output of, as an attachment, the backtrace (via gdb bt) for that core file

Note: Signal 10 is a Bus Error
